stegverse_response: StegVerse treats this as one entry-point request. The selected route is SDK access guidance. A live backend would preserve the user request, explain SDK access, avoid exposing credentials, and prepare governed transition metadata when needed.
route_guidance: Route preview: SDK access guidance. This route explains access paths, manifests, receipts, and authority boundaries without granting access.
sdk_guidance: SDK guidance preview: explain available SDK entry points, required permissions, manifests, receipts, and next steps. Do not expose credentials or imply access has been granted.
